title: Hiring Software Engineer at MagicBricks South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at MagicBricks South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
